No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course is fundamentally about clinical psychology, directly training students to 'promote mental health and well-being' (Target 3.4), making a perfect alignment.

Quality Education.reason: As a university practicum, the course directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and professional skills for employment (Target 4.4), making it a core educational offering.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to consumption or production patterns.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The practicum requires collaboration between the university and 'clinical psychology-related institutions,' directly aligning with Target 17.17 on promoting partnerships.
